== Notes for [[Item:Q3340|Q3340]] ==

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-D708/type/fa/id/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184086/unitid/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184086+-+ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-202956/search/0/Polanco

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADAB48331EFBBFA9822EF79916C8B38
geni:6000000076431876823


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
